title: cota coelopoda var. longiloba
intro: Cota coelopoda var. longiloba, also known as mountain cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that grows in mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its flowers and leaves, which contain flavonoids and terpenoids with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cota coelopoda var. longiloba include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the dried flowers and leaves, which can be used as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
